label: Transparent clustered mussel motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a clustered mussel-shell motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A tight cluster of accurate mussel shells from a rocky shore, overlapping oval bivalve shells with blue-black glossy outer shells, subtle indigo bands, charcoal ridges, pearl-cream nacre edges and a few clean seaweed-green strands tucked between shells. Natural clustered data-system silhouette: modular, repeating, interlocked shell units, not a food plate.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full cluster and shell tips; do not crop any shell edge or seaweed strand.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves blue-black shell gloss, pearl cream highlights, fine growth rings, and subtle wet rocky-shore texture without casting any shadow onto the background.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no sand, no ocean background, no rocks, no plate, no sauce, no cooked food styling, no hands, no decorative scene, no second separate subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Mussel", derived from the visible transparent clustered mussel-shell motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from clustered rocky-shore mussel shells: glossy blue-black shells, indigo bands, charcoal ridges, pearl-cream nacre edges, wet seaweed green accents, subtle sand-shell beige, and clustered modular shell geometry. The board is the implementation reference for coding a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible clustered data system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 composition, landscape orientation. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Avoid dense tiny text; use fewer bigger token rows so labels survive gallery preview downscaling.
Required visible sections: Morphous Mussel, Mussel, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples. Use labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語見出し, 本文, 数値. Show multilingual product UI guidance for dense data products.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons with icon slots, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, pagination, filters, date picker, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, clustered data dashboard metric cards, node-cluster chart, line chart, stacked bar chart, compact table, empty state, loading state, error state, success/warning/info status, progress, stepper, simple lucide-style icons.
Components and layout mood: clustered data system, compact analytics dashboard, modular shell-tile panels, interlocking cluster grids, nacre edge dividers, fine growth-ring texture samples, precise forms and tables, operational density without clutter. Keep all card and component radii 8px or less.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic polished UI mockup, precise grid, restrained data SaaS interface, tactile glossy-shell and nacre texture accents, not a marketing landing page.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: blue-black shell, ink navy, deep indigo, pearl cream, seaweed green, nacre beige, slate charcoal, shell white, wet-rock gray.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no one-note palette, no rounded corners above 8px, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Mussel", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Mussel" / "Mussel". Translate the same light board language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent clustered mussel-shell motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Mussel board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles and UI language: glossy blue-black shells, deep ink navy, indigo shell bands, pearl-cream text highlights, seaweed-green focus and success states, nacre beige borders, wet-rock gray muted surfaces, clustered modular shell geometry, growth-ring texture, and compact analytics/data density.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 composition, landscape orientation. Clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation for a clustered data system. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Mussel, Mussel, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples. Use labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 日本語見出し, 本文, 数値. Show multilingual product UI guidance for dense data products.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons with icon slots, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, pagination, filters, date picker, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, clustered data dashboard metric cards, node-cluster chart, line chart, stacked bar chart, compact table, empty/loading/error states, success/warning/info status, progress, stepper, simple lucide-style icons.
Visual details: deep blue-black shell background, ink navy panels, pearl cream foreground text, seaweed green focus rings and healthy status chips, nacre beige borders, indigo primary action states, wet-rock muted fields, subtle glossy shell streak and growth-ring texture overlays, clustered tile panels, restrained contrast, crisp controls and dashboards, precise 8px grid and 8px-or-less card radius.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic polished dark UI mockup, compact analytics SaaS interface, tactile glossy-shell and nacre texture accents, not a marketing landing page.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradient dominance, no flat pure-black-only background, no one-note palette, no rounded corners above 8px, no illegible text, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Mussel".
